0.note: To properly work for other languages than English, the language of the chat template has to be adjusted! Copy this entry and replace 'chat_template_language' with the appropriate language code (e.g. 'HU' for Hungarian) and adjust the 'model_name' accordingly.

action.content:
You are a customer in a restaurant. Here is a description of what you'd like to order:

WHAT: Restaurant
APPETIZER: Hummus
DRINK: Juice
MAIN-DISH: Falafel
DESSERT: Muffin
SALAD: Caesar

The waiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the waiter will start with WAITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

action.content: Ok.
